_meta.purpose: Stool/urine HELMINTH (worm egg / larva) -> disease. Keys are YOLO class names (snake_case) from the helminths detector. The vision service resolves each detected ovum/larva to its disease + significance. Intestinal protozoa live in protozoa_organisms.json (separate detector). Decision support only; a microscopist/clinician validates.
_meta.source: Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 species + common stool/urine parasites (WHO, CDC DPDx). Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

ascaris_lumbricoides.name: Ascaris lumbricoides ovum
ascaris_lumbricoides.note: Heavy load -> intestinal obstruction; larvae -> Loffler syndrome. Treat: albendazole/mebendazole.

trichuris_trichiura.name: Trichuris trichiura ovum
trichuris_trichiura.note: Heavy infection -> anaemia, rectal prolapse in children. Treat: mebendazole/albendazole.

hookworm.name: Hookworm ovum
hookworm.note: Major cause of IRON-DEFICIENCY ANAEMIA and protein loss. Treat: albendazole + iron.

enterobius_vermicularis.name: Enterobius vermicularis ovum
enterobius_vermicularis.note: Perianal pruritus; scotch-tape test more sensitive. Treat household.

hymenolepis_nana.name: Hymenolepis nana ovum
hymenolepis_nana.note: Most common tapeworm worldwide; autoinfection. Treat: praziquantel.

taenia.name: Taenia spp. ovum
taenia.note: Eggs of T. solium and T. saginata are identical. T. solium -> CYSTICERCOSIS / neurocysticercosis risk. Treat: praziquantel.

opisthorchis_viverrini.name: Opisthorchis viverrini ovum
opisthorchis_viverrini.note: Chronic infection -> CHOLANGIOCARCINOMA risk. Treat: praziquantel.

paragonimus.name: Paragonimus spp. ovum
paragonimus.note: Haemoptysis -> often MISDIAGNOSED AS TB. Treat: praziquantel.

capillaria_philippinensis.name: Capillaria philippinensis ovum
capillaria_philippinensis.note: Severe malabsorption / protein-losing enteropathy; can be FATAL if untreated. Treat: albendazole.

schistosoma_haematobium.name: Schistosoma haematobium ovum (terminal spine)
schistosoma_haematobium.note: Terminal haematuria; chronic -> BLADDER SQUAMOUS-CELL CARCINOMA risk. Treat: praziquantel.

schistosoma_mansoni.name: Schistosoma mansoni ovum (lateral spine)
schistosoma_mansoni.note: Chronic -> periportal fibrosis, portal hypertension. Treat: praziquantel.
